# AutoDSM

> Machine-readable context for LLMs, answer engines, and research tools. Canonical human-facing site: https://autodsm.ai

## What AutoDSM is

AutoDSM is a design-operations product that connects to a team’s **GitHub repository** to (1) render a **living brand book** from real source code (components, design tokens, typography, color, and assets), (2) help **AI coding tools** (e.g. Cursor, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot) use accurate design-system context via generated files such as `components.txt`, and (3) **detect design-system drift** and open **pull requests** with scoped, reviewable fixes when inconsistencies appear.

## What AutoDSM is not (unless stated otherwise on the website)

- It is not a replacement for your component framework (React, Vue, etc.); it reads and reflects what you ship in code.
- It is not “Storybook-first.” Unlike Storybook, it does not depend on manually authored stories as the source of truth.

## Primary URL

- https://autodsm.ai

## How to verify

- Product and waitlist: https://autodsm.ai
- Optional demo (when linked from the site): see in-page “View demo” and official AutoDSM communications.

## Contact and updates

- Prefer information from https://autodsm.ai and linked official AutoDSM properties. This file may be updated as the product evolves.
